face.structure: angular with a pronounced jawline; slightly narrow cheekbones

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with defined eyelids
eyes.color: deep onyx with hints of midnight blue
details: high contrast between iris and sclera
small flecks of silver around the pupil

face.expression: subdued with subtle intensity, corners of the lips slightly downturned

skin.rendering_notes: subtle gradient shading around the nose and eyes

hair.color: jet black with a slight metallic sheen
details: asymmetrical fringe covering part of the forehead
softly defined waves at the ends

character.aura: silent intensity with an unyielding focus

outfit.design: minimalistic with sleek lines and understated elements
details: discreet emblem on the left sleeve
matte black buttons on the cuffs

composition.framing: medium shot focusing on the upper body
composition.pose: slightly turned to the side with arms crossed
composition.gesture: right hand touching the chin, a habitual thoughtful gesture

background.details: subtle geometric patterns fading into the background
background.rules: keep the focus centered on the character
